# Family Profile — Schengen Visa Application *(template)*

**Classification:** CONFIDENTIAL — no PII stored in this file
**Copy to:** `docs/00-family-profile.md`
**Convention:** use placeholders (`APPLICANT_1`, `[CITY]`, `[DATE]`); never write real names, passport numbers, addresses, or DOBs into this file.

---
